code:
sequenceDiagram
    title Docker Security Implementation Sequence
    
    participant Client as Client
    participant Apache as Apache Container
    participant Crowdsec as Crowdsec Agent
    participant Firewall as Firewall Bouncer
    participant PHP as PHP-FPM Container
    participant DB as MariaDB Container
    participant DinD as Docker-in-Docker
    
    Note over Client, DinD: Network Security
    
    Client->>Apache: HTTP/HTTPS Request
    
    %% Crowdsec Security Flow
    Apache->>Crowdsec: Log request for analysis
    Crowdsec->>Crowdsec: Parse and analyze logs
    
    alt Malicious Request Detected
        Crowdsec->>Firewall: Add client IP to blocklist
        Firewall->>Client: Block future requests
        Apache->>Client: Return 403 Forbidden
    else Request Allowed
        Apache->>PHP: Forward request via Unix socket
    end
    
    %% Container Isolation
    Note over Apache, DB: Container Security Isolation
    
    %% User permission security
    Apache->>Apache: Run as non-root user (HealthTech_PatientRecords)
    PHP->>PHP: Run as non-root user (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)
    DB->>DB: Run with limited privileges
    
    %% Volume permissions
    Note over Apache, DB: Volume Security
    Apache->>Apache: Access socket with specific permissions
    PHP->>PHP: Access socket with specific permissions
    
    %% HTTPS communication
    Client->>Apache: HTTPS Request
    Apache->>Apache: SSL Termination with server.crt/key
    Apache->>PHP: Internal communication over Unix socket
    
    %% Security Headers
    PHP->>Apache: Response with generated content
    Apache->>Apache: Add security headers
    Apache->>Client: Response with security headers
    
    %% DinD Security
    Note over DinD: Docker-in-Docker Security
    DinD->>DinD: Run with privileged mode
    DinD->>DinD: SSH access with authentication

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech系统绘制一个完整的安全架构时序图。核心思路是Client请求先经过Apache容器，然后由Crowdsec Agent做实时威胁检测，恶意流量会被Firewall Bouncer拦截。另外PHP-FPM和MariaDB都要以非特权用户运行，最后还要包含Docker-in-Docker的安全配置。
明白了。关于Crowdsec的检测流程，是Apache直接把日志发给Crowdsec Agent分析，然后由Agent决定要不要通知Firewall Bouncer封禁IP吗？还有那个Docker-in-Docker，它和前面的容器是什么关系？
对的，Apache把请求日志forward给Crowdsec做parse和analyze。如果判定为恶意，Crowdsec就命令Firewall Bouncer把该Client IP加入blocklist。Docker-in-Docker是独立部署的，主要跑一些特权容器任务，通过SSH做身份认证访问。

好的，我已经把主参与者按顺序排好了：Client、Apache Container、Crowdsec Agent、Firewall Bouncer、PHP-FPM Container、MariaDB Container，最后是Docker-in-Docker。现在画Crowdsec的安全分支——检测到恶意请求时，Firewall Bouncer拦截并返回403；正常请求则通过Unix socket转发给PHP-FPM。
容器隔离部分要强调一下权限控制。Apache和PHP-FPM分别用HealthTech_PatientRecords和HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine这两个非root用户运行，MariaDB也要限制权限。另外Apache和PHP-FPM之间的Unix socket访问需要特定的volume权限配置。

收到，我在Apache和PHP-FPM各自的生命线旁加了自调用注释，标注运行用户。MariaDB那边也加上limited privileges的说明。HTTPS部分我这样处理：Client先发HTTPS请求到Apache做SSL Termination，然后Apache和PHP-FPM内部走Unix socket通信，最后PHP返回的内容经过Apache加上security headers再发给Client。这样对吗？
SSL Termination的密钥文件要注明是server.crt和server.key。还有DinD部分，需要明确标注privileged mode和SSH认证这两个安全要点，之前可能漏掉了SSH access with authentication的细节。

已修正，Apache的SSL Termination现在标注了server.crt/key。Docker-in-Docker的Note里也补上了privileged mode和SSH access with authentication。整个时序图现在包含三个主要Note区域：Network Security、Container Security Isolation、Volume Security，以及DinD自己的安全说明。
很好，这个版本完整覆盖了HealthTech系统的多层安全防护。从入口的Crowdsec检测、Firewall拦截，到容器内的非root运行、volume权限控制，再到通信层的HTTPS和security headers，最后DinD的特权隔离都体现出来了。可以定稿了。
